Five Nights at Poppy

Ever stayed late at school or walked through a dark hallway alone and felt like something was watching you? Did you just hear the footsteps? Is it the wind or someone whistling? Now imagine that same creep, but at an abandoned mental hospital where animatronic Poppy from FNAF stays in.

Play Five Nights at Poppy Online

Loading game...
About Five Nights at Poppy

Ever stayed late at school or walked through a dark hallway alone and felt like something was watching you? Did you just hear the footsteps? Is it the wind or someone whistling? Now imagine that same creep, but at an abandoned mental hospital where animatronic Poppy from FNAF stays in. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Five Nights at Poppy in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Crazy game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Five Nights at Poppy for free?

Yes. Five Nights at Poppy is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Five Nights at Poppy?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
